task_completion.description: Verify that the 'TimelineEvent' vertices contain the correct properties.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the details or properties pane of the created vertices to confirm the presence of 'EventDate' (DATE), 'Type' (STRING), and 'Summary' (STRING) fields.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'StartsJourney' edge linking the user profile to the earliest event.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of 'NextEvent' edges connecting the timeline events.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'NextEvent' edges connect the events in a strict chronological sequence.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a genuine database client or GUI connected to the 'demodb' database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard database management interfaces (e.g., ArangoDB Web UI, Neo4j Browser, DBeaver, DataGrip) with 'demodb' selected as the active database.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually executed the commands to modify the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for success messages, execution times, or updated row/vertex counts in the database client, rather than just queries typed into a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the graph or timeline is generated by the database, not a drawing tool.
integrity.visual_evidence: The visual representation of the nodes and edges should be rendered by the database GUI's native graph explorer or query result panel, not a separate diagramming application.
